time.description: Event timestamp in epoch time (seconds since 1970-01-01). If omitted, Splunk uses the current time.

host.description: Hostname or IP address of the event source

event.description: The event data. Can be a string or a JSON object. This is the actual data payload to be indexed.

fields.description: Additional metadata fields to associate with the event. These fields are indexed as metadata and can be searched.
